summary: Completed testing of Differential Pricing feature for Mandi Accounting System. All 10 backend API tests passed. UI testing confirmed all frontend elements working correctly. Balance sheet remains tallied (difference=0) after differential pricing operations.
test_credentials: None required - app uses MongoDB locally
seed_data_creation: Test sales created and deleted during testing. Used existing Bepaari: KISHOR (b6718523-6cfe-41fe-930c-d97ffd7f008f) and Dukandar: GABBAR (b29dbd04-ada5-48b2-b69a-1dc217627e65)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Differential Pricing feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) POST /api/daily-sales with dukandar_rate creates sale with correct dukandar_amount calculation. 2) When dukandar_rate equals rate or is not provided, both dukandar_rate and dukandar_amount are stored as null. 3) PUT /api/daily-sales/{id} correctly updates dukandar_rate and recalculates dukandar_amount. 4) Balance Sheet commission includes rate_diff field which sums (dukandar_amount - gross_amount) for all differential pricing sales. 5) Balance Sheet tallies (difference=0) after differential pricing operations. 6) Dukandar Ledger uses dukandar_amount (when present) for purchases calculation. 7) Bepaari Ledger uses gross_amount (not dukandar_amount) for sales calculation. 8) UI shows 'Duk. Rate (optional)' field in entry form, 'DUK. RATE' column in table (shows dash for normal sales), and 'Duk. Rate' field in edit modal.

create_sale_with_dukandar_rate.details: POST /api/daily-sales with dukandar_rate correctly calculates dukandar_amount = quantity * dukandar_rate. Gross amount uses bepaari rate.

create_sale_without_dukandar_rate.details: POST /api/daily-sales without dukandar_rate works exactly as before. dukandar_rate and dukandar_amount are null.

create_sale_with_same_rate.details: When dukandar_rate equals bepaari rate, both dukandar_rate and dukandar_amount are stored as null (optimization).

update_sale_add_dukandar_rate.details: PUT /api/daily-sales/{id} with dukandar_rate correctly updates and recalculates dukandar_amount.

update_sale_clear_dukandar_rate.details: Setting dukandar_rate to same as rate clears both fields to null.

balance_sheet_rate_diff.details: Balance Sheet commission includes rate_diff field. Rate diff = sum of (dukandar_amount - gross_amount) for all differential pricing sales.

balance_sheet_tallies.details: Balance Sheet difference = 0 after creating differential pricing sales. Rate diff is added to commission on liabilities side.

dukandar_ledger_uses_dukandar_amount.details: Dukandar Ledger purchases calculation uses dukandar_amount when present, otherwise gross_amount.

bepaari_ledger_uses_gross_amount.details: Bepaari Ledger uses gross_amount for sales calculation (not affected by dukandar_rate).

ui_duk_rate_field_in_form.details: Daily Sales entry form shows 'Duk. Rate (optional)' input field with data-testid='dukandar-rate-input'.

ui_duk_rate_column_in_table.details: Daily Sales table has 'DUK. RATE' column. Shows dash (—) for normal sales, shows rate value for differential pricing sales.

ui_duk_rate_in_edit_modal.details: Edit Sale modal includes 'Duk. Rate:' field with 'Optional' placeholder.

ui_rate_diff_in_dashboard.details: Dashboard commission card shows 'Rate Diff: +₹X' when rate_diff > 0. Hidden when rate_diff = 0.
